metadata.description: User-triggered one-off actions (interactables) presented in Admin Updates UI

interactables.name: Migrate Gogs to Forgejo
interactables.description: One-time migration: replace Gogs with Forgejo (Git server). Run when you are ready to switch. Update modules will then use Forgejo only (group ladder).

interactables.name: Debian 12 → 13 in-place upgrade
interactables.description: One-time in-place upgrade from Bookworm to Trixie. Backs up APT sources, switches suite to trixie, runs apt full-upgrade, adds trixie-backports. Distro upgrades PostgreSQL 15→17; existing PG data needs separate migration (see docs). Reboot required after run. Only shown on Debian 12 (bookworm).

interactables.name: PostgreSQL 15 → 17 migration
interactables.description: WARNING: May break your shit; backup first; manual intervention may be required. In-place upgrade via pg_upgrade. Stops PostgreSQL and dependent services (Vaultwarden, Gogs/Forgejo, FreshRSS), migrates cluster to 17, updates systemd unit. Proceed at your own risk. Only shown after Debian 12→13 has been run (logical next step). On Trixie, PostgreSQL 17 is the default; script installs it if missing.

interactables.name: PHP-FPM migration to default PHP
interactables.description: WARNING: Can fuck your shit up; backup first. After a distro upgrade (e.g. Debian 12→13), pool configs and units may still point at the old PHP. This script detects the in-use and default PHP versions at runtime and migrates pool configs (Piwigo, Ampache, FreshRSS) and systemd units to the default. No version numbers hardcoded. Only shown after Debian 12→13 has been run.
